news.t: Federated Hermes launches active ETF targeting high monthly distributions

holdings.infoBox: PAYR is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micro E-mini S&P 500 Index Future June 26 stock at 3.69%, Paychex at 3.59%, U.S. Bancorp at 3.59%, Enbridge at 3.33%, and The PNC Financial Services Group at 3.23%.

overview.description: The Federated Hermes Enhanced Income ETF (PAYR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming for high income and long-term capital appreciation. The fund invests in US dividend-paying stocks combined with covered call writing for potentially additional income. PAYR was launched on Oct 7, 2025 and is issued by Federated Hermes.
